content.headline: Transform Your Fitness Journey with AI-Powered Coaching

items.question: What is FitForge?
items.answer: FitForge is an AI-powered fitness coaching platform that provides personalized workout plans, nutrition tracking, and progress monitoring

items.question: How does FitForge work?
items.answer: FitForge uses machine learning algorithms to create customized workout plans and nutrition tracking recommendations based on your goals, fitness level, and preferences
